durable_improvement: Added an atomic fail-closed deployment evidence finalizer that builds the exact manifest, immediately verifies it against source/run identity and artifact bytes, refuses overwrite, and removes invalid output.

verification.route: local Node syntax validation before commit

blocker: The cloudflare-research GitHub environment still requires valid CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN values before the authoritative workflow can deploy and prove a resolving hostname.
next_action: Wire finalize-deployment-evidence.mjs and its test into .github/workflows/cloudflare-pages-research.yml immediately before artifact upload, include the generated manifest in the upload set, then dispatch after Cloudflare credentials are configured.
